events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the fault is charging by subjective feel ("beer-can cold" suction line) instead of the manufacturer's subcooling/superheat method — a classic overcharge indicator that risks compressor floodback and elevated head pressure. Flagged as `fail` (non-compliant with OEM charging procedure) with medium risk, and outlined the diagnostic steps needed to verify metering device type, calculate actual subcooling/superheat, and correct the charge against the mfr chart.
